title: TUNG SOURN BATON
description: The mod adds batons from the famous meme "tun-tun-tun-SAKHUR"
body:
The mod adds batons from the famous meme "tun-tun-tun-SAKHUR".  

You can purchase these batons in creative mode, which can be used to inflict damage on enemies — in particular, iron and wooden batons. In addition, it is possible to make them on a workbench.

Supported Languages: Russian
